sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Trane Technologies는 2025년 3분기 상업용 HVAC 부문의 강력한 수요에 힘입어 60억 달러의 기록적인 수주액과 15%의 조정 EPS 성장을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 상업용 HVAC 부문의 강력한 수요를 바탕으로 전년 대비 15% 증가한 60억 달러의 기록적인 분기 수주액을 달성했습니다.
조정 EPS는 전년 대비 15% 증가한 3.88달러를 기록했으며, GAAP 영업이익률은 150포인트 개선되었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 미주 지역 상업용 HVAC 부문의 유기적 수주액이 30% 증가했으며, 특히 어플라이드 솔루션(applied solutions) 부문은 100% 이상의 성장세를 보였습니다.
주거용 시장의 도전적인 환경에도 불구하고, 물량 증가와 가격 인상 및 생산성 향상을 통해 인플레이션 영향을 상쇄했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 순매출은 57억 4,300만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 6% 증가했습니다.
기업 전체 수주 잔고는 2024년 말 대비 7% 증가한 72억 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 주거용 HVAC 시장의 부진이 지속되는 상황에서 향후 분기별 매출 및 수주액 회복세가 유지될지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991-q32025earningsr.htm EX-99.1 Document Trane Technologies Reports Strong Third Quarter Results Highlights (third-quarter 2025 versus third-quarter 2024, unless otherwise noted): l Record enterprise bookings of $6 billion, up 15 percent; organic bookings up 13 percent l Bookings strength led by Americas Commercial HVAC, up approximately 30 percent, applied solutions up over 100 percent l GAAP operating margin up 150 bps, adjusted operating margin* up 170 bps l GAAP continuing EPS of $3.82; adjusted continuing EPS* of $3.88, up 15 percent l Enterprise backlog of $7.2 billion, up 7 percent versus year-end 2024 * This news release contains non-GAAP financial measures. Definitions of the non-GAAP financial measures can be found in the footnotes of this news  Normalized numeric aliases: $6 billion = 60억 달러; $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $6 = 6달러; $3.82 = 3.82달러; $3.88 = 3.88달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러; 15 percent = 15%; 13 percent = 13%; 100 percent = 100%; 30 percent = 30%; 7 percent = 7%.

h nologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today reported diluted earnings per share (EPS) from continuing operations of $3.82 for the third quarter of 2025. Adjusted continuing EPS was $3.88, up 15 percent. Third-Quarter 2025 Results Financial Comparisons - Third-Quarter Continuing Operations $, millions except EPS Q3 2025 Q3 2024 Y-O-Y Change Organic Y-O-Y Change Bookings $5,979 $5,213 15% 13% Net Revenues $5,743 $5,441 6% 4% GAAP Operating Income $1,165 $1,025 14% GAAP Operating Margin 20.3% 18.8% 150 bps Adjusted Operating Income* $1,182 $1,026 15% Adjusted Operating Marg  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.82 = 3.82달러; $3.88 = 3.88달러; $5,979 = 5,979달러; $5,213 = 5,213달러; $5,743 = 5,743달러; $5,441 = 5,441달러; $1,165 = 1,165달러; $1,025 = 1,025달러; $1,026 = 1,026달러; $16.7 = 16.7달러; 5,743 million = 57억 4,300만 달러; 1,026 million = 10억 2,600만 달러; 1,025 million = 10억 2,500만 달러; 1,182 million = 11억 8,200만 달러; 1,252 million = 12억 5,200만 달러; 1,127 million = 11억 2,700만 달러; 15 percent = 15%.

we delivered 15% adjusted EPS growth and achieved all-time-high quarterly bookings of $6 billion, up 13% organically, despite challenging residential markets,” said Dave Regnery, chair and CEO, Trane Technologies. “Our commercial HVAC business remains strong, and our project pipeline continues to expand as customers increasingly choose Trane Technologies for the most efficient and sustainable solutions. “Our performance continues to be led by Americas commercial HVAC, with organic bookings up 30% -- driven by more than 100% growth in applied solutions -- and organic revenue up low-teens in the quarter. -more- -2- “With our leading innovation, elevated backlog, and strong financial position, we are well-positioned to continue to deliver differentiated shareholder value over the long term.” Highlights from the Third Quarter of 2025 (all comparisons against third-quarter 2024 unless otherw  Normalized numeric aliases: $6 billion = 60억 달러; $6 = 6달러.

ise noted) • Strong bookings of $6 billion, up 15 percent; organic bookings up 13 percent. Bookings strength led by Commercial HVAC, up approximately 30 percent. • Book-to-bill was more than 100 percent in Commercial HVAC in all regions. • Enterprise reported revenues were up 6 percent; organic revenues were up 4 percent. • Excluding Residential, enterprise organic bookings and revenues were up 26 percent and 10 percent, respectively. • GAAP operating margin was up 150 basis points, adjusted operating margin was up 170 basis points and adjusted EBITDA margin was up 110 basis points. • Volume growth, positive price realization and productivity more than offset inflation. The Company also continued high levels  Normalized numeric aliases: $6 billion = 60억 달러; $6 = 6달러; 15 percent = 15%; 13 percent = 13%; 30 percent = 30%; 100 percent = 100%; 6 percent = 6%; 4 percent = 4%; 10 percent = 10%; 26 percent = 26%; 150 basis points = 150포인트; 170 basis points = 170포인트; 110 basis points = 110포인트.
